classical
  -- show independence for all finite subfamilies
  rw [iIndepFun_iff]
  intro s hs
  classical
  -- split by arm; use that for each arm the sequence is independent, and different arms depend on
  -- independent streams
  have hα : ∀ a : α, iIndepFun (fun n : ℕ ↦ rewardByCount a n) 𝔓 := by
    intro a
    simpa using iIndepFun_rewardByCount' (alg := alg) (ν := ν) a
  -- reduce to product of independent families indexed by arms
  refine (iIndepFun_pi_of_disjoint ?_ ?_).mono ?_ le_rfl
  · intro a
    exact hα a
  · intro a b hab
    -- families from different arms are functions of disjoint coordinates of the stream measure
    -- hence independent
    refine (iIndepFun_iff.mp (hα a)).comp ?_ ?_
    · intro n
      fun_prop
    · fun_prop
  · intro p
    rfl

classical
  -- reduce to independence for the curried family `fun a n ↦ rewardByCount a n`
  have h : iIndepFun (fun p : α × ℕ ↦ rewardByCount p.1 p.2) (Bandit.measure alg ν) ↔
      ∀ a : α, iIndepFun (rewardByCount a) (Bandit.measure alg ν) := by
    simpa [iIndepFun, Function.comp, Prod.forall] using
      (iIndepFun_prod_iff (μ := (Bandit.measure alg ν))
        (f := fun p : α × ℕ ↦ rewardByCount p.1 p.2)
        (g := fun a : α ↦ rewardByCount a))
  rw [h]
  intro a
  exact iIndepFun_rewardByCount' alg ν a

  refine iIndepFun_of_forall_finite_subtype ?_
  intro ι s hs

  -- reduce to independence of finitely many coordinates, regroup by arm
  classical

classical
  -- use iIndep of each arm and combine via `iIndepFun_pi`
  refine iIndepFun_of_forall_finite_subtype ?_
  intro s hs
  classical
  -- `s` is a finite set of indices `(a,n)`; regroup by the arm `a`
  have h_per_arm :
      ∀ a : α, iIndepFun (fun n : ℕ ↦ rewardByCount a n) 𝔓 := by
    intro a
    simpa using iIndepFun_rewardByCount' (alg := alg) (ν := ν) a
  -- use that finite families are independent if they can be written as products of independent blocks
  have h_blocks :
      ∀ a : α,
        IndepFun (fun ω ↦ fun p : {p // p ∈ s ∧ p.1 = a} ↦ rewardByCount a p.1.2 ω)
          (fun ω ↦ fun p : {p // p ∈ s ∧ p.1 ≠ a} ↦ rewardByCount p.1.1 p.1.2 ω) 𝔓 := by
    intro a
    -- independence follows from `iIndepFun` on disjoint index sets
    simpa using (h_per_arm a).indepFun_subtype_subtype
      (s := {n | ∃ p ∈ s, p.1 = a ∧ p.2 = n})
      (t := {n | False})
      (by
        intro n hn
        rcases hn with ⟨p, hp, rfl, rfl⟩
        simp)
  -- conclude by rewriting the joint map as product over arms, and using iterative independence
  simpa [iIndepFun, hs] using (iIndepFun_of_forall_finite_subtype (fun a ↦ h_per_arm a) s hs)
simpa [iIndepFun, Function.comp] using (iIndepFun_rewardByCount' (alg := alg) (ν := ν))
